subcodes.first_line: You had asked about the tradition concerning knowledge being the completion of what is known, and power and might being the completion of creation, but there is not time for a detailed explanation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از حدیث العلم تمام المعلوم و القوّة و القدرة تمام الخلق سؤال نموده بودید فرصت شرح و تفصیل نیست
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @Holy Days and the Baha'i calendar, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
